Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

Tashkent Medical Academy revered university is situated in the capital city of Uzbekistan–Tashkent. The academy is renowned for providing medical degrees.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Uzbekistan
  • January 25, 2025
  • Home
  • Uzbekistan
  • Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan
# Uzbekistan

Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

The flag of Uzbekistan has some special characteristics it has three horizontal stripes with the top stripe being blue, the middle one white, and the bottom green. These three colors have meaning, and blue reflects the water and the sky which are important for sustenance. White mirrors peace and cleanliness, while green is for nature and the land’s richness. The top left corner of the flag has crescent moon along with twelve stars that represent the desire of the nation and its deep history.

Tashkent Medical Academy revered university is situated in the capital city of Uzbekistan–Tashkent. The academy is renowned for providing medical degrees. The great atmosphere at the academy facilitates learning and ensures proper growth of the learners in any area of medicine. The university is renowned as a global institution by organizations like WHO, and students from all over the globe, particularly India, enroll in the academy for its low fees and high standard of learning. Students pursuing medical degrees at Tashkent Medical Academy are offered more than just quality education, they are also given a chance to experience the kindness of Uzbekistan’s culture.

Affiliation and Recognition of Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

Tashkent Medical Academy is for sure a reputable institution in Uzbekistan and famous for its medical programs. It has maintained a working relationship with many educational and medical institutions around the world. Here’s a summary of their partnerships and awards

Externally Funded Activities Recognized by International Organizations

Tashkent Medical Academy has an endorsement of the WHO.

Indian students who wish to study at Tashkent Medical Academy are allowed to study there because the academy has approval of the Medical Council of India.

Its activities are also endorsed by UNESCO owing to its standards and quality of education.

Externally Funded Activities In Collaboration With Other Universities

The academy has partnerships with Seoul University of Korea and Humboldt University in Germany.

Also, it has partnerships with Samara State Medical University as well as Moscow State Medical University.

Such partnerships guarantee a quality education for students due to the international scope and focus of the institutions which further enhances their career potential.

Why Study MBBS at Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan?

Tashkent Medical Academy has many perks for students pursuing an MBBS degree, such as

No Special Degree Needed

Easier for Indian and foreign students as a NEET scorecard is the only requirement for admission.

Anti-Ragging Policies

There’s no tolerance for any malicious act; the institution has created a safe space for all students.

Globally Accepted Qualifications

The Tashkent Medical Academy MBBS degree can be practiced in almost all parts of the world.

Reasonable Pricing

The academy provides affordable MBBS program compared to many other nations while ensuring quality education is provided.

Financial Assistance Availability

For those who require support in paying for their education, the university extends scholarship opportunities.

Accommodation

Comfortable hostels are available to students with the necessary amenities for a pleasant experience.

Does Not Compromise Safety

Students attending the academy in Tashkent can benefit from the affordable transportation and feel safe in the city.

Quick Highlights About Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

These are details regarding Tashkent Medical Academy one of the prominent medical educational university in Uzbekistan.

Year of Establishment 2005
Type Govt.
Recognition NMC and WHO approved
Eligibility 50% in Physics, Chemistry and Biology Aggregate
Course Duration 6 years
NEET Qualifying Marks
IELTS/TOFEL Not Required
Medium of Teaching English

Advantages of MBBS at Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

The Medical College of Tashkent and its Tashkent branch have many associated benefits that make studying MBBS there worthwhile.

Cost Effective Education

The institution provides reasonably priced medical education which is considered good in quality.

Degree Accepted Worldwide

Students are able to pursue a number of different career opportunities after receiving the globally accepted MBBS degree.

Instructional Language Not An Obstacle

The language of instruction is English, which is beneficial to international students, especially those coming from India.

Students Safe and Protected

The academy provides students with a secure and safe environment free from harassment or any form of intimidation.

Additional Features

The Tashkent Medical Academy provides students with up to date learning facilities which has modern equipped laboratories and clinical skill training centers.

Educational Grants 

Many of the students at the academy benefit from scholarship programs designed to help cover the cost of education.

Student Housing

Students are offered the option to reside in hostels that are well kept and fully furnished.

Networking Opportunities With Other Institutions

Collaboration with other international institutions enables the academy’s students to be involved in medical practices and medical breakthroughs around the globe.

Fees Structure of Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

The fee structure for the MBBS program at Tashkent Medical Academy is as follows

ParticularsYear 1Year 2Year 3Year 4Year 5Year 6
Tuition Fee3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD3500 USD
Hostel Fee600 USD600 USD600 USD600 USD600 USD600 USD

Additional Notes

Conversion of Currency 1 USD = ₹82 (this might change depending on the market rate).

These numbers are estimates and can change due to currency valuation or other elements.

This route facilitates MBBS students to study at a reputable Tashkent Medical Academy without dealing with a hefty fee structure.

Duration Of MBBS At Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

At Tashkent Medical Academy, medical education follows the MBBS curriculum which is structured over six years, divided into two distinct phases. In the first phase which is of five years duration, students are taught various subjects such as anatomy, physiology, biomedical sciences, microbiology, pharmacology, and many more through lectures and hands-on practical sessions and clinical work in hospitals.

In the second phase, a one year internship, students are placed at health care facilities to practice what they have learned during the course. They work closely with registered healthcare professionals, including nurses and doctors, and actively participate in healthcare delivery. This phase is crucial as it consolidates the knowledge gained, fosters clinical skills, and facilitates the development of professional attitudes.

Upholding a mature blend of theoretical concepts and clinical exposure fosters and enhances the students’ potential for an effective medical practice, leading to the award of an MBBS degree which is valid internationally.

Ranking of Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

Tashkent Medical Academy is ranked as follows

National Ranking: 7th in Republic of Uzbekistan

World Ranking: 5882 out of the rest of the world.

These rankings are an indicator of the overall perception towards the academy in Uzbekistan and across other countries.

Faculties of Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

Tashkent Medical Academy consists of various medical faculties of a professional nature. These are the main faculties of the academy.

Faculty of Medicine

Trains doctors and teaches general medicine at an advanced level.

Faculty of Dentistry

Dentistry major in the understanding which takes the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of diseases of the mouth and its structures.

Faculty of Pharmacy

Educational program in pharmacy that prepares specialists in pharmaceutical sciences and in the sphere of drugs and medicines supply management.

Faculty of Neuroscience

Teaches subjects pertaining to brain and nervous system; like neurology, psychiatry, etc.

Faculty of Paediatrics

Concentrates on children’s health that includes infants, children, and adolescents.

Faculty of Surgery

Deals with surgical practices; teaching students to perform some medical procedures and operations.

Faculty of Postgraduate Programs

Provides further specialization in different medical fields for those who have completed their MBBS.

These specialized faculties guarantee that students of the Tashkent Medical Academy acquire comprehensive education and targeted training in their areas of specialization.

Eligibility Criteria To Study at Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

To take the MBBS course at Tashkent Medical Academy, students should fulfill the following requirements

Educational Qualification

Admits must possess a certification equivalent to the 12th grade with a concentration in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology from a recognized educational institute.

Minimum Marks

All the general category students will be required to score 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology combined.

Students from reserved categories, i.e. SC, ST, OBC, need to score 45% in these subjects.

Age Limit

At the time of admission, a student should be 17 years or older.

The maximum age limit for admission is 25 years.

NEET

Students must have the qualifying score in the NEET exam.

These requirements assure depth in elenments of science which will allow for a smooth transition into the study of medicine at Tashkent Medical Academy.

Admission Process at Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

The Tashkent Medical Academy MBBS admission procedure is simple. Here’s how it works:

Step 1: FIll Out the Application Form

Navigate to the official webpage of Tashkent Medical Academy and register.

You need to complete the application form by providing your name, educational level, and even your phone number.

Step 2: Submit Application to the Rector

The application should be directed to the head of the academy (also known as the head of the institution) under the specified program as well as the medium of instruction you intend to enroll for.

Step 3: Document Submission

Provide the following documents to the academy:

Notarized copies of your academic records (these should be in Russian or Uzbekistan).

Your identity card and a copy of your passport.

Birth certificate copy.

A medical certificate.

A receipt of cash payment as evidence of being financially stable.

A letter of invitation from the academy.

Step 4: Admission Confirmation

After your documents are checked, a letter of admission is issued to you from the Tashkent Medical Academy.

You can now apply for your visa and make the necessary arrangements to travel.

This process facilitates easy acquisition of admission and subsequently the commencement of MBBS at the academy.

Document Required For Admission At Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

Enrolling into Tashkent Medical Academy will require the following documents:

A scanned copy of your passport.

For identification and visa processing, a passport is required.

Mark Sheets

Ensure that you have mark sheets from both your 10th and 12th grades or any equivalent documents.

Certified document of your birth certificate.

A certified copy of your birth certificate is needed which is authorized by an appropriate body.

Medical Certification

A health certificate which states that the person is medically fit to pursue the study of medicine.

Receipt of Funds

Your letter of acceptance will need documents that shows financial ability to meet tuition fees accommodation and living expenses whilst pursuing your studies.

Invitation Letter

A document from Tashkent Medical Academy enclosing an admissions statement confirming your enrollment.

Photographs

Needed for application and other official documents are passport-sized photographs.

Ensuring and preparing these documents in accordance with the requirements from the academy in a logical manner will facilitate the smooth admission processes.

Hostel And Accommodation At Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

It is well known that Tashkent Medical Academy has created modern hostel accommodation for its students hunting for educational services, including international students. Here are the details:

Hostel Facilities: The academy had five student dormitories which can accommodate around 1,700 students.

Safety and Security: The hostels are on the premises of the academy which ensures the safety of the students. Control at the entry and exit of the hostels is done by turnstiles. Guardians of every district are assigned to each hostel.

Amenities: Several amenities offered by the hostels include modern furnished common halls, kitchens, computer rooms, as well as library study rooms.

Location: The dormitories are also within proximity to the hostels, so the students have little to no difficulty commuting to and from the college.

In a nutshell, the hostels at Tashkent Medical Academy encourages students to pay more of their attention on achieving their academic goals as they work tirelessly to achieve their educational objectives, which might be difficult for them if they were any other place other than the hostels.

Assistance for MBBS Admission At Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

In case you need help with MBBS admission to Tashkent Medical Academy, you can engage the help of professional educational consultancies who will help you in every step of the way. Here’s how the process works:

Profile Evaluation

The consultancy will evaluate your following academic background, your NEET score and any other documents that can prove are admissable.

University Shortlisting

Based on your preferences, the consultancy will aid you in selecting appropriate universities and programs to apply for such as Tashkent Medical Academy.

Application Preparation

The consultancy will provide assistance in filling and submission of the application form with all supporting documents within the stated deadlines.

Visa Process

They will further assist you in preparing your visa application alongside the necessary documents which include invitation letters, medical certificates and proof of funds.

Admission & Confirmation

Once your application is accepted, the consultancy will assist you in obtaining the offer letters from Tashkent Medical Academy.

Pre-departure Assistance

For your smooth transition, they will assist you with travel arrangements, accommodation, and any other preparations before you depart.

Ongoing Support

Some consultancies provide this aid to further assist you after your admission with any issues that may arise when studying abroad.

These services can help streamline the admission process, guaranteeing that your journey toward attaining an MBBS from Tashkent Medical Academy is free of unnecessary challenges.

FAQs At Tashkent Medical Academy, Uzbekistan

The following are the general frequently asked questions (FAQs) about Tashkent Medical Academy that can assist prospective students to learn more about the institution:

What is the duration of the MBBS program at Tashkent Medical Academy?

The MBBS program runs for a period of six (6) years: Five (5) years study and one (1) year of internship.

Is the medium of instruction in English?

Tashkent Medical Academy uses the English language as a medium of instruction which aids students from different countries including Indians to study orthopedics easily.

Do I need to clear NEET to study MBBS at Tashkent Medical Academy?

Students willing to enroll in Tashkent Medical Academy must first take the NEET examination and obtain qualifying scores for one to be eligible for admission.

Is hostel accommodation available for international students?

Tashkent Medical Academy does offer hostel accommodation with modern facilities and high security for international students.

What is the fee structure for the MBBS program?

The Tuition fee for Tashkent Medical Academy is around 3500 USD per year and additional 600 USD for hostel accommodation would be required each year.

This questions are relevant for students seeking more information regarding their medical studies on Tashkent Medical Academy.
